ATTY. SIERRA S. ARBALLO OF THE PHILIP M. ANDERSEN & ASSOCIATES, TEL. NO. 1-925-225-6838 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT BY TELEPHONE APPEARANCE.

RULING - A R G U E D; THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND RULED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT STEVEN JOHNSON's Motion To Compel Plaintiffs Attendance At Medical Examination is Granted. Defendant has shown good cause for IME more than 75 miles from venue. Defendant to pay for ancillary cost if necessary. Request For Monetary Sanctions is Denied.
